channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Tanzanian workers urge government and employers to ease economic strain through salary review and tax relief
item.description: As the cost of living climbs sharply in Tanzania, largely driven by rising global fuel prices and disruptions linked to the conflict involving the United States, Israel, and Iran, workers’ unions are ...

item.title: Iranian LEGO Video Highlights Australia's Refusal to Join US Naval Blockade
item.description: A recent viral video produced by the Iranian-linked outlet Explosive News features LEGO characters representing Australia to highlight the country's decision not to join a US-led naval blockade in the...

item.title: Kericho children seek refuge with grandmother after alleged parental murder-suicide linked to affair
item.description: A deeply painful tragedy has rocked Boito Ward in Konoin, Kericho County, where Faith Chepngeno was allegedly killed by her husband, Nicholas Rotich, before he reportedly took his own life. The shocki...

item.title: CCTV reveals organised night robbery at Mr Bingo’s Nairobi electronics shop worth KSh 16 million losses
item.description: Moses Mwangi, popularly known as Mr Bingo on TikTok, is facing major financial and emotional distress after his electronics shop in Nairobi’s Central Business District was broken into and cleared out ...

item.title: NFF responds to dispute over unpaid bonuses and allowances for Flying Eagles players
item.description: Some members of Nigeria’s U-20 national football teams (Flying Eagles), particularly the 2023 and 2025 squads, have raised concerns over unpaid qualification bonuses and camp allowances owed to them b...

item.title: Beyoncé promotes Cécred haircare line in new Instagram campaign featuring styling session and brand launch
item.description: Beyoncé has promoted her inclusive haircare brand, Cécred, through a series of social media posts showcasing a recent launch event and behind-the-scenes styling footage. The singer, aged 44, shared im...

item.title: PMA raises concerns over AHPC Act allowing independent practice by technicians
item.description: The Pakistan Medical Association (PMA) has voiced strong concerns over the recent enforcement of the Allied Health Professionals Council (AHPC) Act, arguing that it opens a risky legal loophole by per...

item.title: LENTE Conducts Voter Education Sessions in Tawi-Tawi Ahead of 2026 BARMM Elections
item.description: The Legal Network for Truthful Elections (LENTE), in collaboration with the United Nations Development Programme (UNDP) and the Bangsamoro Women Commission (BWC), carried out voter education activitie...

item.title: Witness Madriaga Attends Second House Hearing on Duterte Impeachment
item.description: In the ongoing political proceedings concerning the impeachment of Vice President Sara Duterte, witness Madriaga appeared at the second hearing conducted by the House Committee on Justice. The session...

item.title: Kaizer Chiefs’ Cedric Kaze confident despite early-season criticism
item.description: Kaizer Chiefs’ co-coach Cedric Kaze has opened up about the criticism he faced early in the season when fans dubbed him and co-coach Khalil Ben Youssef 'translators,' referring to their previous role ...

item.title: Sgt Fannie Nkosi appears in court for bail hearing following arrest
item.description: Sgt Fannie Nkosi, a member of the Organised Crime Unit, appeared at the Pretoria North Magistrates Court on Monday to apply for bail. Nkosi was arrested earlier this month after police conducted a rai...

item.title: Britney Spears Begins Treatment Following DUI Arrest
item.description: According to reports, pop singer Britney Spears has checked into a rehabilitation center shortly after being arrested for driving under the influence (DUI). While official statements have not yet conf...

item.title: Geordin Hill-Lewis Faces Political Challenges as DA Leader
item.description: Geordin Hill-Lewis has been elected as the new leader of the Democratic Alliance (DA), and he expresses confidence that the party can gain power by the 2029 general election. The article draws a playf...

item.title: Heathrow Handles More Passengers Amid Middle East Airspace Closure
item.description: Heathrow Airport in London experienced a notable 10 percent rise in transit passengers in March due to the ongoing US-Iran war, which led to the closure of key Middle Eastern airspace. This conflict d...

item.title: Prince Harry and Meghan Markle visit Melbourne children's hospital as they begin a private four-day tour of Australia focused on mental health and veterans
item.description: Prince Harry and Meghan Markle have arrived in Australia for a four-day privately funded tour that will take them through Melbourne, Canberra, and Sydney. The couple landed at Melbourne’s Tullamarine ...

item.title: Liberals achieve majority government after winning key Toronto byelections
item.description: Prime Minister Mark Carney’s Liberal Party has secured a majority government following a series of decisive byelection victories, including key wins in Toronto’s Scarborough Southwest riding. The vict...

item.title: PKTT takes over investigation into killing of Emfuleni municipal employee in Vanderbijlpark
item.description: The Political Killings Task Team (PKTT) has taken over the investigation into the murder of Martha Mani, an employee at the Emfuleni Local Municipality in Vanderbijlpark. Mani, who worked in the Finan...

item.title: British Columbia Reflects on a Decade of Toxic Drug Crisis
item.description: British Columbia is observing the tenth anniversary of its public health emergency declared in response to the ongoing toxic drug crisis. The declaration, made in April 2016, followed a surge in overd...

item.title: DA Wins Retraction After Defamatory Blog Post About Stellenbosch Municipality
item.description: The Democratic Alliance (DA) announced that it has successfully secured a full retraction from an online publication called 'The Cape Independent' after the blog published what the DA described as a d...

item.title: Pakistan launches AI Seekho 2026 initiative in partnership with Google to train youth in AI skills
item.description: The Government of Pakistan has partnered with Google for Developers along with the Ministry of IT and Telecommunication, Telenor, and Innovista to launch a nationwide initiative called ‘AI Seekho 2026...
